title: Marrowbone
tmdbOverview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.
synopsis: Released in 2017, Marrowbone is a thriller, horror and mystery film from Spain and United States. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
